title: Bucket
description: OptiFine alternative for Fabric, with added features for the best experience on servers
body:
# **OptiFine Alternative for Servers** OptiFine alternative for Fabric + more QoL features, made for use on servers and fully client-side. ## **What's Included** - Optimization mods including Sodium, Lithium, and tons more - Shader support and more customizable lighting - OptiFine texture and model support, so you can use OptiFine resource packs - QoL UI and HUD tweaks - Ability to change your skin in-game - Mods to enhance server experience, including Xaero's minimap mods and Litematica - & tons more
Everything Included **Mods** - [EMF] Entity Model Features - [ETF] Entity Texture Features - 3D Skin Layers - Animatica - AppleSkin - BadOptimizations - Better Mount HUD - Better Statistics Screen - BetterGrassify - Bobby - Capes - Chat Heads - Chat Notify - Chat Patches - Cherished Worlds - Clean F3 - Concurent Chunk Management Engine - Continuity - Controlify - CraftPresence - CubesWithoutBorders - Controlling - Controlling - Debugify - Dynamic Crosshair - Durability Tooltip - e4mc - Entity Culling - Fabrishot - Fast IP Ping - FerriteCore - GammaUtils - ImmediatelyFast - Iris Shaders - In-Game Account Switcher - LambDynamicLights - Language Reload - Litematica - Lithium - Mod Menu - Modernfix - More Culling - Mouse Tweaks - No Chat Reports - No Telemetry - Noisium - Optiboxes - OptiGUI - Polytone - Pick Up Notifier - Reese's Sodium Options - Remove Reloading Screen - Roughly Enough Items (REI) - Replay Mod - ScalableLux - Show Me Your Skin! - Skin Shuffle - Sodium - Sodium Extra - Stendhal - Shulker Box Tooltip - ThreadTweak - Very Many Players - Who Am I? - Xaero's Minimap - Xaero's World Map - XaeroPlus - Zoomify **APIs and Libraries** - Fabric API - Architectury API - CICADA - Cloth Config API - Fabric Language Kotlin - Forge Config API Port - MaLiLib - MidnightLib - TCDCommons API - Text Placeholder API - UniLib - YetAnotherConfigLib - Searchables - Super Martijn642's Config Lib **Resource Packs** - Chat Reporting Helper - Low Fire - Low Shield - Slightly Improved Font (32x) - Translations for Sodium
Note This pack is derivative of [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop)
